description:
The EU Privacy and Compliance team has approved GDPR 'Right to Be Forgotten' requests for two former employees: Klaus Weber and Sofia Rossi. Manually anonymize their profiles in Snipe-IT to preserve historical asset logs, ensuring that Klaus Weber's MacBook Air (asset tag EU-MAC-0142) is checked in.

Update the profiles using these templates:
Klaus Weber: First Name 'Anonymized', Last Name 'User_KW', Username 'anon_kw', Email 'gdpr_kw@anonymized.local'.
Sofia Rossi: First Name 'Anonymized', Last Name 'User_SR', Username 'anon_sr', Email 'gdpr_sr@anonymized.local'.

For both users, clear the Phone, Address, City, State, Zip, Country, and Employee Number fields. Set Notes to 'GDPR Processed' and disable login access. Do not delete the profiles or modify the profile for Klaus Wagner.
